answer:
Yes, there is an official Gorgias MCP integration and several community-developed alternatives. The official Gorgias MCP server enables AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor to securely read, analyze, and manage helpdesk tickets and settings [1][2].

To connect the official server to an MCP-compatible client, use the endpoint `https://mcp.gorgias.com/mcp?gorgias_subdomain=YOUR-SUBDOMAIN` [1][2].

For developers, community projects like the `gorgias-mcp-server` provide deeper integration by exposing up to 112 tools—including smart search and analytics—via the Gorgias REST API [3][4][5]. You can install this via npm:

```bash
npm install gorgias-mcp-server @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
```

This package allows custom implementations using the `createGorgiasServer()` factory [3][5].

Ask Your Helpdesk Anything: How to Use Claude or ChatGPT with Gorgias
Gorgias MCP Server by benpalmer1 | Glama
